description_long: This object is a linear guard rail composed of a long, horizontal main rail supported by evenly spaced vertical posts. The main rail appears to be a solid, rectangular beam, while the vertical posts are cylindrical and extend above the top rail, providing a barrier effect. The base of the guard rail is a thick, solid section that likely serves as the mounting or anchoring component. The entire structure is uniform in color and material, suggesting it is made primarily of metal, likely steel, for strength and durability. There are no visible decorative elements, reflective markings, or end treatments, giving it a utilitarian and industrial appearance. The ends of the rail are blunt and squared off, with no flaring or tapering.
description: A long, solid metal guard rail with evenly spaced vertical posts and a thick rectangular base, all in a uniform dark color. The design is utilitarian, with blunt ends and no visible markings.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full length of the guard rail, the evenly spaced vertical posts, and the rectangular base.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile of the guard rail and the thickness of the base.
description_view_2: Bottom-up or mirrored top-down view, similar to view 0, highlighting the uniformity and spacing of the posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the narrow profile and base thickness.
